name: PT Mitra Keluarga Karyasehat Tbk
summary: PT Mitra Keluarga Karyasehat Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, owns and operates hospitals in Indonesia. The company provides healthcare services; and operates a pharmacy. Its hospital network comprises of 16 Mitra Keluarga hospitals and 8 other hospitals located in Jakarta, Bekasi, Cikarang, Depok, Cibubur, Tangerang, Sukabumi, Karawang, Cirebon, Surabaya, Cibinong, Subang, and Tegal. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Bekasi, Indonesia. PT Mitra Keluarga Karyasehat Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Griyainsani Cakrasadaya.
